goals.title: PER-163 QA rejection rework
goals.objective: Replace rejected static PER-163 fixture generator with component-backed two-peer LocalBus and WebRTC RPC harness evidence, update tests/docs, regenerate artifacts, and return PR 57 to QA.
goals.evidence: Reworked scripts/mesh_gap_e2e_harness.py from static pass fixture generator into executable two-peer component harness: thread_localbus uses LocalBus.request, mesh_webrtc uses production RPCHandler.on_message -> provider LocalBus.request, process/HTTP/Tauri rows are explicit preflight and not final proof. Updated tests/docs. Verification: .venv/bin/python scripts/mesh_gap_e2e_harness.py passed with 30 component passes, 45 preflight rows, final_mesh_mode_status=pass; .venv/bin/pytest tests/e2e/test_mesh_gap_e2e_harness.py -q passed 4 tests; .venv/bin/ruff check scripts/mesh_gap_e2e_harness.py tests/e2e/test_mesh_gap_e2e_harness.py passed; QA targeted mesh suite passed 113 tests.

goals.title: PER-163 QA rejection live transport rework
goals.objective: Promote PER-163 HTTP Gateway, Tauri local/native, and Mesh/WebRTC rows to executable transport evidence; mark process BullMQ/Redis as an explicit dependency blocker until mode-processes dependencies and Redis are available or architecture grants a waiver.
goals.evidence: scripts/mesh_gap_e2e_harness.py now drives http_gateway_thin_client through generated Gateway FastAPI routes via httpx.ASGITransport, tauri_local_native through a local/native LocalBus smoke boundary, and mesh_webrtc through aiortc RTCPeerConnection.DataChannel into production RPCHandler.on_message. The full report status is blocked when process_bullmq_redis is selected because the repo venv lacks bullmq and redis. Verification: .venv/bin/python scripts/mesh_gap_e2e_harness.py --mode mesh_webrtc --mode http_gateway_thin_client --mode tauri_local_native passed 45 executable rows; .venv/bin/python scripts/mesh_gap_e2e_harness.py full matrix reported 60 pass and 15 dependency_gap; .venv/bin/ruff check changed harness/test files passed; .venv/bin/pytest tests/e2e/test_mesh_gap_e2e_harness.py -q passed 4 tests; targeted mesh regression suite passed 113 tests; .venv/bin/python import check reported bullmq False and redis False.
